RLUSD Stablecoin Full Rollout Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
Ripple USD (RLUSD) has officially completed full-scale rollout across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum, with this milestone achieved by mid-April 2026.[1]

signals.raw:
SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
The long-standing SEC legal battle is now officially concluded, removing a major regulatory overhang.[1]

signals.headline: Institutional ETF Inflow Acceleration | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Institutional ETF Inflow Acceleration | YES | HIGH confidence**
XRP investment products recorded $224 million in inflows during the first week of April—the largest single-country-led inflow rebound since December.[3] Notably, spot ETF inflows preceded futures demand, indicating institutional rather than leveraged retail buying.

signals.headline: IMF Article IV Consultation Concludes: Little Room for Fed Rate Cuts in 2026 Despite 2
signals.raw:
IMF Article IV Consultation Concludes: Little Room for Fed Rate Cuts in 2026 Despite 2.4% GDP Growth Projection | NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1]

Federal Reserve expected to hold rates steady through 2026 amid persistent **core PCE inflation** at 2.6% by year-end, tariff-driven goods price hikes (effective rate 7-8.5%), and energy shocks from Iran conflict delaying 2% target to 2027[1][2][5].
